summary: Registers CRM navigation groups and toolbar surfaces in the app shell.

outputs.description: Shell registration object for CRM navigation and actions.

notes: Use when wiring CRM into the shared shell.

summary: Lists CRM contacts with reusable filtering and pagination.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Optional page, pageSize, search, status, organizationId, and ownerProfileId filters.

outputs.description: Paginated CRM contacts plus total counters.

notes: Prefer this helper over dashboard-shaped CRM payloads when building app-owned contact tables and search.

examples.label: Load the first page of contacts
examples.code: const result = await listCrmContacts(supabase, { page: 1, pageSize: 50, status: "lead" });

summary: Deprecated compatibility alias for the organizations module list helper.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with organization schema access.

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Optional page, pageSize, and search filters.

notes: Deprecated: import listOrganizations from @brightweblabs/module-orgs for new code.
The alias remains supported so module-crm's public API stays stable.

summary: Returns contact counts grouped by status.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

outputs.description: Total CRM contact count plus counts by status.

notes: Use for app-owned CRM overview cards and summaries.

summary: Lists staff and admin owner options for CRM assignment flows.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema access.

outputs.description: Deduplicated owner options derived from staff and admin role assignments.

notes: Use for app-owned CRM filters, assignment pickers, and ownership forms.

summary: Lists profile records suitable for CRM primary-contact selectors.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with profile table access.

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Optional limit override.

notes: Use only when a page needs primary-contact selector data; contacts and stats can be loaded without it.

summary: Lists recent CRM status-change timeline entries with contact and actor labels.
auth: signed-in user required in the caller context

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with CRM schema and profile access.

inputs.name: params
inputs.description: Optional since timestamp and limit override.

outputs.description: Recent CRM status-log entries normalized with display labels.

notes: Use for progressively loaded CRM timeline sections without forcing the full dashboard payload.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM contact listing.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request with optional CRM contact query parameters.

outputs.description: JSON response containing a CRM contacts list payload or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

examples.label: Mount the contacts endpoint
examples.code: export async function GET(request: Request) { const { handleCrmContactsGetRequest } = await import("@brightweblabs/module-crm"); return handleCrmContactsGetRequest(request); }

query.name: pageSize
query.description: Page size capped at 100. Defaults to 50.

query.name: search
query.description: Case-insensitive search across first name, last name, email, and phone.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM organization listing.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request with optional organization query parameters.

outputs.description: JSON response containing a CRM organizations payload or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

query.name: pageSize
query.description: Page size capped at 100. Defaults to 20.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM contact status stats.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request for CRM stats.

outputs.description: JSON response containing CRM status stats or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

success.description: Total CRM contacts plus counts by status.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for CRM owner options.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request for CRM owner options.

outputs.description: JSON response containing owner options or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

success.description: Deduplicated owner options for staff and admin profiles.

summary: Validates and creates a CRM contact.
auth: staff-authenticated Supabase client required; database policy enforces access

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Authenticated server Supabase client.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Contact identity, status, source, organization, and owner fields.

inputs.name: options
inputs.description: Optional activity actor context.

notes: Normalizes email and validates email, phone, status, and required identity fields.

summary: Validates and updates mutable CRM contact fields.
auth: staff-authenticated Supabase client required; database policy enforces access

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Authenticated server Supabase client.

inputs.name: contactId
inputs.description: CRM contact ID.

inputs.name: patch
inputs.description: Mutable CRM contact fields.

notes: Status changes use setCrmContactStatus so SQL history remains complete.

summary: Changes one CRM contact status through the set_crm_status SQL function.
auth: staff-authenticated Supabase client required; database function enforces access

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Authenticated server Supabase client.

inputs.name: contactId
inputs.description: CRM contact ID.

inputs.name: status
inputs.description: Target funnel status.

inputs.name: reason
inputs.description: Optional status-change reason.

outputs.description: The contact after the status transition.

notes: The set_crm_status RPC owns crm_status_log writes and unchanged-status no-op behavior.

summary: Changes the status of multiple distinct CRM contacts.
auth: staff-authenticated Supabase client required; database function enforces access

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Authenticated server Supabase client.

inputs.name: contactIds
inputs.description: CRM contact IDs to update.

inputs.name: status
inputs.description: Target funnel status.

notes: Deduplicates IDs and invokes set_crm_status once per contact.

summary: Deletes one CRM contact and records generic CRM activity.
auth: staff-authenticated Supabase client required; database policy enforces access

inputs.name: supabase
inputs.description: Authenticated server Supabase client.

inputs.name: contactId
inputs.description: CRM contact ID.

notes: Mirrors the delete operation supported by the reference CRM application.

summary: Package-owned POST handler for CRM contact creation.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: JSON request containing CRM contact creation fields.

outputs.description: 201 JSON response with the created contact or an error envelope.

notes: Rejects malformed JSON and non-staff callers before performing writes.

summary: Package-owned PATCH handler for CRM contact and funnel updates.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: JSON request containing a contact ID or contact IDs and fields to update.

outputs.description: JSON response with one updated contact or the updated contact IDs.

notes: Supports single-contact field updates and single or bulk status transitions.

summary: Starter dashboard helper that bundles the current CRM page payload.

outputs.description: Starter CRM dashboard payload for the current scaffolded page.

notes: Replace or compose this helper when a project needs a different CRM page shape.

summary: Package-owned GET handler for contact status history.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Request with optional contactId, since, and limit query parameters.

notes: The default CRM UI uses this at /api/crm/timeline.

summary: Creates the default CRM HTTP client without hardcoding URLs in components.

inputs.name: basePath
inputs.description: CRM API base path; defaults to /api/crm.

inputs.name: fetcher
inputs.description: Injectable fetch implementation.

outputs.description: Client callbacks for CRM reads and writes.

notes: Starter status allows route envelopes to evolve before the next stable UI contract.

summary: Portuguese dictionary containing every default CRM UI string.

outputs.description: Default Portuguese CRM copy and formatters.

notes: Copy the object and override nested values for another locale.

summary: Canonical ordered CRM funnel stage metadata.

outputs.description: Five stages with labels and token names.

notes: Override through the stages prop on CRM surfaces.

summary: Searchable, sortable, selectable, paginated CRM contacts table.
auth: none; data and callbacks are supplied by the caller

notes: Column order, visibility, labels, and custom cells are configurable.

summary: CRM contact status-history timeline using shared activity messages.

summary: Ready-to-mount CRM dashboard composition with default data and write orchestration.
auth: inherits the supplied client or default app route session

notes: Starter status is consistent across package-owned UI surfaces while their customization contract matures.
